purpose: Actionable Standard extra-display candidate list after audit cleanup. Rejected cards are moved to rejected.json.

source.basedOn: User audit under data/cards/review/standard-extra-display-candidates/audit plus follow-up cleanup.
source.exclusionPolicy: Remove cards whose extra display was explicitly rejected by audit; keep low-priority edge cases with audit notes.
source.note: The card names and Chinese rules text are copied from the source review JSON; extraDisplay is a recommendation for manual review, not a final implementation contract.

cards.cardTextZhCN: 召唤在本局对战中死亡的法力值消耗最高的友方亡灵。
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 召唤在本局对战中死亡的法力值消耗最高的友方亡灵。

extraDisplay.reasoningZhCN: 悼念成真只看死亡友方亡灵中的最高费候选。

cards.cardTextZhCN: 奇闻 战吼：抽取邦桑迪（如果他已经死亡则将其复活），选择并使其获得一项恩泽。
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 奇闻 战吼：抽取邦桑迪（如果他已经死亡则将其复活），选择并使其获得一项恩泽。

extraDisplay.reasoningZhCN: 塔兰吉只绑定邦桑迪的位置/死亡状态。

reviewFields: extraDisplay.displaySurfaces: top_bar/hand/deck/play/board/graveyard/hover surfaces where state should appear
extraDisplay.emptyWarning: pool displays should warn when count is zero
extraDisplay.notesZhCN: audit caveats and low-priority notes
